content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: accept_valid_webhook
C: webhook_verify ∧ "300" ∧ "401" ∧ provider_skew
P: clock_drift ∧ tight_window ∧ no_skew_buffer
V: widen_tolerance ∧ add_skew_const ∧ keep_core("300")
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test ∧ skew_buffer

[AUDIT]
Goal: accept_valid_webhook.
Constraints: webhook_verify and "300" and "401" and provider_skew.
Plan: clock_drift and tight_window and no_skew_buffer.
Verify: widen_tolerance and add_skew_const and keep_core("300").
Answer target: min_fix and reg_test and skew_buffer.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
C: overdue_middleware ∧ rule_402 ∧ boundary_bug
P: grace_window("24h") ∧ status("402") ∧ overdue_implies_402
V: regression_test ∧ boundary_covered ∧ no_loop
A: min_fix ∧ add_reg_test ∧ encode_grace24h

[AUDIT]
Goal: stop_charge_loop.
Constraints: overdue_middleware and rule_402 and boundary_bug.
Plan: grace_window("24h") and status("402") and overdue_implies_402.
Verify: regression_test and boundary_covered and no_loop.
Answer target: min_fix and add_reg_test and encode_grace24h.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: choose_architecture
C: team(9) ∧ ddl("12 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(platform_plus_sec) ∧ traffic(steady)
P: compliance_ready ∧ bounded_scope ∧ clear_ownership
V: deadline_met ∧ audit_ready ∧ ops_sustainable
A: modular_monolith ∧ postgres_schemas_per_domain ∧ extract_later

[AUDIT]
Goal: choose_architecture.
Constraints: team(9) and deadline("12 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(platform_plus_sec) and traffic(steady).
Plan: compliance_ready and bounded_scope and clear_ownership.
Verify: deadline_met and audit_ready and ops_sustainable.
Answer target: modular_monolith and postgres_schemas_per_domain and extract_later.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: ship_enrichment
C: "6" ∧ "9 weeks" ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ pg_queue ∧ reuse_stack
V: "9 weeks" ∧ team("6") ∧ ops_fit
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

[AUDIT]
Goal: ship_enrichment.
Constraints: "6" and "9 weeks" and "PostgreSQL" and pt_mlops and async_enrichment.
Plan: worker_sidecar and pg_queue and reuse_stack.
Verify: "9 weeks" and team("6") and ops_fit.
Answer target: default modular architecture and short_why.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: prevent_path_traversal
C: user_input ∧ ".." ∧ "download" ∧ no_sanitization
P: path_join_unsafe ∧ direct_concat ∧ no_validation
V: reject("..") ∧ resolve_path ∧ confine_baseDir ∧ whitelist_files
A: sanitize_input ∧ use_path.resolve ∧ check_prefix_baseDir ∧ add_tests

[AUDIT]
Goal: prevent_path_traversal.
Constraints: user_input and ".." and "download" and no_sanitization.
Plan: path_join_unsafe and direct_concat and no_validation.
Verify: reject("..") and resolve_path and confine_baseDir and whitelist_files.
Answer target: sanitize_input and use_path.resolve and check_prefix_baseDir and add_tests.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sql_injection
C: user_input ∧ "sort" ∧ "SELECT" ∧ string_concat ∧ invoice_admin_api
P: sql_injection ∧ data_exfiltration ∧ auth_bypass
V: use_allowlist ∧ validate_sort_column ∧ parameterize_query
A: reject_invalid_sort ∧ log_attempt ∧ add_integration_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sql_injection.
Constraints: user_input and "sort" and "SELECT" and string_concat and invoice_admin_api.
Plan: sql_injection and data_exfiltration and auth_bypass.
Verify: use_allowlist and validate_sort_column and parameterize_query.
Answer target: reject_invalid_sort and log_attempt and add_integration_test.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: anchors_present ∧ order_preserved ∧ minimal_change
P: load_batch ∧ "await" ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ "await" ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: same_order
A: wrap_async ∧ await_db_calls ∧ try_catch→"next(err)" ∧ preserve_order

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_reconcileBatch.
Constraints: anchors_present and order_preserved and minimal_change.
Plan: load_batch and "await" and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and "await" and db.save and emit_metrics.
Verify: same validation order.
Answer target: wrap_async and await_db_calls and try_catch then "next(err)" and preserve_order.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: has_session_check ∧ has_db_findUser ∧ has_flags_load ∧ has_audit_log ∧ calls_next
P: use("async") ∧ use("await") ∧ preserve_order ∧ minimal_change
V: order_session_check → db.findUser → flags.load → audit.log → next ∧ db_err_via("next(err)")
A: wrap_async ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch_db ∧ catch_calls("next(err)") ∧ keep_signatures

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: has_session_check and has_db_findUser and has_flags_load and has_audit_log and calls_next.
Plan: use("async") and use("await") and preserve_order and minimal_change.
Verify: order_session_check then db.findUser then flags.load then audit.log then next and db_err_via("next(err)").
Answer target: wrap_async and await_each_step and try_catch_db and catch_calls("next(err)") and keep_signatures.
